title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: Hello everybody! As you could probably tell, I'm at the hair salon right now. I've already chopped off a lot of my hair and my stylist is mixing some colors so that I can dye my hair. So I decided that I'm going to get a balayage and that will brighten up my hair color for the summer.

So I've got all the color in my hair now and I'm just letting it marinate. It looks like I can talk to aliens with all this tin foil in my hair. I'm so excited to see what it's going to look like at the end. I love when they put in the shampoo in conditioner. It's so relaxing.

title: will / shall
examples: Hello everybody! As you could probably tell, I'm at the hair salon right now. I've already chopped off a lot of my hair and my stylist is mixing some colors so that I can dye my hair. So I decided that I'm going to get a balayage and that will brighten up my hair color for the summer.

We've been working on my hair for three hours now. It's a lot of hard work trying to be beautiful but I know it'll be worth it in the end but I had to stand up and stretch. Do I look like a elf with my ear covers? I don't want dyed ears. Now she is trimming my hair, low drying it and styling it. I feel like as I get older I really try to take care of like my hair and my skin. Like when I was younger I never really took care of it much. Now it's really really important to me. I said it takes her five minutes, it takes me an hour.

title: can / could / be able to
examples: Hello everybody! As you could probably tell, I'm at the hair salon right now. I've already chopped off a lot of my hair and my stylist is mixing some colors so that I can dye my hair. So I decided that I'm going to get a balayage and that will brighten up my hair color for the summer.

I'm very excited, I've got my cape on, my pillow, I'm very comfortable and it's just ready for a new change. So something like this, I still want it below my shoulders but where it's like a blunt cut and then maybe longer face framing layers but for length maybe a little bit below the shoulders because I feel like my hair is kind of thin. I just read that maybe a blunt cut can kind of give it a little bit more volume. I'm nervous but I guess it's time for a change. I've had the same hair cut for quite a long time though I'm ready for short hair girl summer. It's really dark and I really didn't feel like myself. Yeah it was like so dark like black and I didn't feel like myself. I already feel lighter. I think I need this hair cut to survive Korea's humidity. I always get a little bit nervous but I always try to keep the perspective that it can always grow back.

So I've got all the color in my hair now and I'm just letting it marinate. It looks like I can talk to aliens with all this tin foil in my hair. I'm so excited to see what it's going to look like at the end. I love when they put in the shampoo in conditioner. It's so relaxing.
I feel like a new woman. It feels so good. My hair is so soft. No, I wish I couldn't get this every day. It's not too short I think. I know but I didn't think I was going to cut any this morning.

title: have to / must
examples: We've been working on my hair for three hours now. It's a lot of hard work trying to be beautiful but I know it'll be worth it in the end but I had to stand up and stretch. Do I look like a elf with my ear covers? I don't want dyed ears. Now she is trimming my hair, low drying it and styling it. I feel like as I get older I really try to take care of like my hair and my skin. Like when I was younger I never really took care of it much. Now it's really really important to me. I said it takes her five minutes, it takes me an hour.

title: should (advice)
examples: I feel like a brand new person after this hair appointment. We touched up my roots, we did a balayage to brighten up my hair and I even got a spontaneous haircut and I feel amazing and I'm very happy with the result. My hair is even nice and styled now so I think that I should go on a date today. Thank you all so much for watching.
